title: The Traitor Inside Egghead
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Lucci, Unknown person #12, Luffy, Vegapunk as The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.
scene: The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.
